title: 🏙️ Helsinki Region — HSY (Portolan catalog)
description: A Portolan spatial-data catalog published as a git repository served over GitHub Pages — the repo IS the catalog. Regional planning data from Helsinki Region Environmental Services (HSY). Datasets are Apache Iceberg tables stored as static files alongside this STAC document; query them directly with DuckDB via `iceberg_scan('<the dataset's data.href>')` — no server, no REST catalog, no credentials. Contribute data or report issues via pull requests / issues on this repository (interim, NOT sovereign — see README).

portolan:contributions.note: INTERIM / NOT SOVEREIGN — GitHub Pages is US-hosted (Fastly CDN). Demonstrates the repo-as-catalog model; the sovereign form is the same static files on EU infrastructure (e.g. UpCloud object storage, or self-hosted Forgejo Pages).

links.title: Report issues or contribute data (GitHub — interim, not sovereign)
